data.content: Implemented the core-module style cleanup on branch feat/foolery-d17b-style. Targeted ESLint for the listed lib modules and src/stores/terminal-store.ts is clean for max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len. Validation run in the worktree: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Commit: 0f0fdf649df0.
